posting.sourceTitle: Plumbers & Steamfitters LU #22 JAC of Western NY
posting.sponsorName: Joint Apprenticeship and Training Committee for Plumbers & Steamfitters, Local Union #22
posting.locationSummary: West Seneca, NY; recruitment for the Finger Lakes and Western regions
posting.applicationSummary: Obtain applications in person at Local Union #22 in West Seneca on the second Tuesday of each month, 9:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m., then return them by mail or in person.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: Plumbers & Steamfitters, Local Union #22, 120 Gardenville Parkway, West Seneca, NY 14224
posting.applicationMailingAddress: Plumbers & Steamfitters, Local Union #22, 120 Gardenville Parkway, West Seneca, NY 14224
posting.applicationHours: Applications available in person from 9:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. on the second Tuesday of each month, excluding legal holidays, during the recruitment period. Drop box available 24 hours per day, seven days a week.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED.
posting.residencyRequirement: Must live in Cattaraugus, Chautauqua, Erie, Niagara, or Wyoming Counties; in Genesee County, the townships of Alabama, Oakfield, Elba, Pembroke, Batavia, Darien, or Alexander; in Orleans County, the townships of Yates, Ridgeway, or Shelby; or in Allegany County, the townships of Allen, Alma, Amity, Angelica, Belfast, Bolivar, Caneadea, Centerville, Clarksville, Cuba, Friendship, Genesee, Granger, Hume, New Hudson, Rushford, Scio, or Wirt.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have a valid NYS driver’s license to operate company vehicles and reliable transportation to and from job sites and required classes.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must pass a drug test at the expense of the sponsor after selection and prior to enrollment.
posting.classRequirement: Must take and pass Work Keys Applied Mathematics, Workplace Documents, and Graphic Literacy assessments with a minimum score of 4 in each category. Must also attend required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.
Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED.
Must provide a signed statement from a personal physician attesting that the applicant can physically perform the duties of a Steamfitter.
Must possess a valid NYS driver’s license in order to operate company vehicles.
Must have reliable means of transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.
Must have residency in Cattaraugus, Chautauqua, Erie, Niagara, or Wyoming Counties.
In Genesee County, residency is limited to the townships of Alabama, Oakfield, Elba, Pembroke, Batavia, Darien, and Alexander.
In Orleans County, residency is limited to the townships of Yates, Ridgeway, and Shelby.

In Allegany County, residency is limited to the townships of Allen, Alma, Amity, Angelica, Belfast, Bolivar, Caneadea, Centerville, Clarksville, Cuba, Friendship, Genesee, Granger, Hume, New Hudson, Rushford, Scio, and Wirt.
Must pass a drug test, at the expense of the sponsor, after selection and prior to enrollment in the apprenticeship program.
Must take and pass Work Keys Applied Mathematics, Workplace Documents, and Graphic Literacy assessment tests with a minimum score of 4 out of 7 in each category.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be 18+, have a high school diploma or equivalent, provide a physician’s fitness statement, hold a valid NYS driver’s license, have reliable transportation, live in the listed counties/townships, pass a sponsor-paid drug test, and score at least 4 on required Work Keys tests.
posting.contactSummary: Contact Plumbers & Steamfitters, Local Union #22 for further information.
